title: ballota nigra subsp. velutina
intro: Ballota nigra subsp. velutina, also known as the Velvet Honeysuckle or Velvet Deadnettle, is a subspecies of the perennial plant Ballota nigra, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains iridoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ballota nigra subsp. velutina include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and support overall well-being.
